title: SOC 2 report summary
description: Structured output of the summarize_soc2_report tool. Mirrors the exact contract in prompts/soc2_summarizer_prompt.txt.

service_organization_name.description: Legal name of the service organization the report covers.

audit_period.description: Period covered: a date range for a Type II report, or an 'as of' date for a Type I.

opinion_type.description: The service auditor's opinion, or 'Not stated' if it cannot be determined.

trust_services_criteria.description: Trust Services Criteria categories in scope.

key_exceptions.description: Testing exceptions, deviations, or findings noted in the report.

control_area.description: The control or control area where the exception was noted.

description.description: What the testing exception, deviation, or finding was.

management_response.description: Management's response if the report includes one, otherwise an empty string.

cuecs.description: Complementary User Entity Controls, each stated as a short sentence.

subservice_organizations.description: Subservice organizations named in the report.

service_provided.description: What service they provide to the service organization.

treatment.description: How the report handles them: 'inclusive', 'carve-out', or 'Not stated'.

risk_flags.description: Concise auditor-style flags relevant to a reliance decision.
